data.name: 萊雅的行商蜜事
data.detailed_description:
遊戲故事

出身商人世家的萊雅，本該過著奢靡無憂的生活——
然而父親投資失敗，加上母親長年理財不善，家族財庫瞬間見底，甚至背上鉅額債務！

為了避免家族破產，
萊雅決定在兩個月內償還高達一百萬的外債。

不願讓父母背上罵名，也渴望回歸昔日的優渥生活，
她與生意夥伴納克一同前往首都，打算靠那群愛花錢如命的貴族撈一筆。

雖說有可靠夥伴陪在身邊讓她感到安心——但她也有一個小煩惱。

為了行動方便，也為了提醒自己不要老是看到帥哥就走神，
她在工作時總是男裝出場，以「萊特」之名示人。

兩個月的行商旅程，朝夕相對……
這身分，真的不會穿幫嗎?

角色介紹

萊雅（本名）／萊特（男裝化名）
出身商人名門，擁有卓越的經商手腕。行商期間以男裝示人、自稱「萊特」。
雖然外表冷靜幹練，私底下卻是個肉慾旺盛的女子，思想不純，態度更不純。

遊戲玩法

你有兩個月的時間，
透過各地行商幫萊雅賺錢，目標是償清債務、重返奢華人生！

觀察客人的喜好與需求，推薦最適合他們的商品！

不斷在同一地區經商，能提升當地的「市場開發度」。

當市場開發度達到最大值……似乎會觸發什麼不得了的事件？

成功清還貸款與否，影響著萊雅今後的未來！

請引領萊雅踏上你認為正確的道路吧♥

遊戲特色

快節奏推薦遊戲，從提示中快速挑出正確商品賣給客人，考驗反應與記憶力。

地區探索與解鎖，完成各地區進度、解鎖色色事件！

賺錢添購各種道具，解鎖更多場景互動！

7組劇情CG、2組結局CG、女主角日文配音！

data.short_description: 《萊雅的行商密事》是一款輕解謎、快問快答型的輕鬆小品遊戲。 你將扮演女扮男裝的「萊雅」，踏上一場一邊賺錢還債、一邊壓抑(處理)慾望的刺激行商之旅！
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

data.name: Laura's secret diary
data.detailed_description:
Story

Born into a wealthy merchant family, Laura should have enjoyed a life of luxury and leisure—

But after her father’s failed investment and her mother’s years of poor money management, the family fortune collapsed overnight, leaving them with a massive debt!

To prevent her family from going bankrupt,

Laura resolves to repay an enormous debt of one million within just two months.

Unwilling to let her parents bear the shame, and longing to restore her comfortable life,

she sets off for the capital with her business partner, Nak, aiming to make a fortune from the spendthrift nobles.

While the company of a reliable partner is reassuring, Laura has a little secret:

For convenience—and to remind herself not to get distracted by handsome men—

she always dresses as a man when working, introducing herself as “Light.”

Two months of trading together, day and night…

Will her true identity really remain hidden?

Characters

Laura / “Wright”

A talented merchant from a prestigious family. During her travels, she dresses as a man and goes by the alias “Wright.”

Though she appears calm and capable, she is in truth a passionate woman with an impure mind—and even less pure intentions.

Gameplay

You have two full months to
travel between towns, trade goods, and help Laura earn enough money to pay off her debt and reclaim her luxurious life!

Observe your customers’ preferences and recommend the most suitable products for them!

Repeatedly trading in the same area increases its Market Development Level.

When the Market Development Level reaches its maximum… something unexpected—and possibly naughty—might happen♥

Whether you succeed in repaying the loan will shape Laura’s future!
Guide her onto the path you believe is best♥

Features

  • Fast-paced recommendation gameplay: Quickly pick the right item from hints to sell to customers—test your reflexes and memory!

  • Regional exploration & unlocking: Complete each area’s progress to unlock spicy events!

  • Earn money to purchase items and unlock more interactive scenes!

  • 7 sets of story CGs, 2 ending CGs, Japanese voice acting for the heroine!

data.short_description: Help Laura, a female merchant masquerading as a gentleman, pay off her debt and keep her desires in check in this quick-response stylel puzzle game!
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
